Video.summary: From creative recipes to delicious surprises, this challenge showcases the culinary endless possibilities. You'll be amazed at how we turn ordinary food into extraordinary creations!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: It's time to decide who will cook the best dishes!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Discover clever tips and tricks that will help you thrive, regardless of your budget. Whether you're a rich or a poor student, our creative solutions will make your school journey more enjoyable.
Video.grandparentTitle: Surviving High School: DIY Ideas and Crafts
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Dive into a journey of transformation as our classroom nerd discovers her makeover secret! Whether on land or in the sea, every girl has a hidden queen inside!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Friends come in all shapes and sizes… they can even be from another planet or even be a doll. But the main thing is the make us happy.
Video.grandparentTitle: My New Friend Is So Strange!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: You can forget what a poor life is, because from today you have been adopted by a star and you are part of a family of billionaires! Giga rich parents are ready to give the new poor girl whatever she wants! The life of each family member was divided into before and after, and not everyone is happy about it!
Video.grandparentTitle: I Was Adopted by A Star
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Sometimes, all you need is a new look to feel good… even if you’re a doll.
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: What a battle. We hope it left you hungry for more. Who do you think made the best art and the tastier food? The student or the teacher?
Video.grandparentTitle: Student or Teacher: Who is Better?
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Dive into the world of vampires and let your inner darkness shine!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Rich or poor - which one will we try today? No need to choose, because we can offer you all kinds of delicious treats!
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: Get ready for the ultimate showdown - Barbie and Ken! Also, our characters will also share some amazing ideas that you can try out yourself.
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: College life is tough, but it’s harder when you’re one of the four elements. Which power would you want? Water, air, fire or earth?
Video.title: 123GO!

Video.summary: In this exciting video, we'll share innovative tips and creative crafts that are sure to impress your teacher and classmates. Get ready to become the star student you've always wanted to be!

Video.summary: Whether you're flaunting designer heels or rocking DIY outfits, fashion is all about expression. There’s nothing wrong a makeover or some new clothes. In fact, it’s a good thing
